title: Aokiji Steps Onto the Island
description: Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Nico Robin, Luffy, Sanji, Zoro, Aokiji. Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The government isn't taking you seriously, but...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Your party is now especially dangerous..

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What did Nico Robin-chan ever do to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: She didn't do anything to me...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: She escaped once after I arrested her...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: One that you will learn eventually...

summary: Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.
